description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:19.03.12 image with a docker:19.03.13-dind service, defines a before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, and includes the external files /gitlab-build-defs/dev-environment.yml and /gitlab-build-defs/publish.yml. Define three stages: build, test-dev, and test-publish. Add a hidden .build job that runs in the build stage and executes the commands 'docker build -t ${IMAGE_TAG} -f ${DOCKERFILE} ${CONTEXT}' and then 'docker push ${IMAGE_TAG}'. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are specified.
